title: Enforce 44px Tap Targets
description: Global mobile rule (max-width: 768px) enforcing min-height: 44px on button, a, [role='tab'], [role='button'], select, .clickable, .btn, .chip, .tag, .filter-btn, .nav-link across all 11 files.
